name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 7 Jan 2025
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release includes updates from eCommerce releases "},{"text":"6.316.0","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"6.317.0","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENTS","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Added UserGroupId Parameter to GetShippingQuote API","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A new parameter - "},{"text":"UserGroupId","bold":true},{"text":" - has been added to the "},{"text":"GetShippingQuote API","bold":true},{"text":". The parameter enables you to return shipping methods that are only available to a specific User Group. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about the API, see the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fdevelopers.maropost.com%2Fdocumentation%2Fengineers%2Fapi-documentation%2Fshipping%2Fgetshippingquote","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"GetShippingQuote API","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": This enhancement was requested by several customers on Idea Portal."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Improved MyPost Business International Labels","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The following enhancements have been introduced for MyPost Business International Shipping Labels:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"MyPost Business International Labels now contain the country of origin. This value is populated from the Country of Origin selected on the Product Edit page in Neto."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"When generating the MyPost Business International Labels, the long Product Titles are now truncated to 40 characters to comply with Australia Post requirements."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Updated Allied Express Label Template","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Updated the Allied Express label templates to comply with their latest requirements, including new QR codes. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"BUG FIXES","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where, in some cases, the Content Path wasn’t updated when importing Category data through the Data Import tool."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the selection made in the "},{"text":"Tax Free Shipping","bold":true},{"text":" checkbox for an order was not retained if the country was included in the default tax zone."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
